profile.name: Meliscent Aquino
profile.tagline: Every project starts with an idea and ends with an experience.
profile.bio: I'm an IT student who fell in love with the web the first time I realized a browser tab could hold an entire idea. I like clean code, warm colors, and interfaces that feel a little bit like a memory. When I'm not coding, I'm usually watching series, reading books, chasing sunsets, or rebuilding this portfolio for the fifth time.

projects.title: Rock-Paper-Scissors
projects.description: A terminal client vs. client setup allows two players to battle each other over a network connection directly within their command-line interfaces.

projects.title: BrainFreeze Exam
projects.description: A terminal application that simulates an exam environment with a countdown timer, allowing users to answer questions within a set time limit.

projects.title: Ardor Music Shop
projects.description: A webpage for a fictional music shop, showcasing products, services, and contact information in a visually appealing layout.

experience.title: BS Information Technology
experience.description: Focusing on web development and human-computer interaction. Currently building this very portfolio for my WEBDEV1.

experience.title: On-the-Job Trainee
experience.description: Gained hands-on experience in office administration, document management, and workplace communication while supporting daily operations.

experience.title: Junior High School
experience.description: First introduced to HTML here — built a simple website as our requirement. Learned the basics of programming and web development.
